meaning: adj.传教的,传教士的n.传教士
examples: My mother would still like me to be a missionary in Africa.
She had a kind of missionary zeal about bringing culture to the masses.
NB: The opinions stated in this essay do not necessarily represent those of the Church of God Missionary Society.
He trained in France and returned to Ireland as a missionary in about 433 AD.
Like many kgosi, Sechele was keen to have a missionary living in his town.
